---
title: "Adaptive Dynamic Programming for Optimal Control of Discrete-Time Nonlinear Systems With Trajectory-Based Initial Control Policy"
authors:
  - "J. Xu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "Y. Zhong"
year: 2024
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450"
keywords:
  - "adaptive dynamic programming"
  - "optimal control"
  - "nonlinear systems"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450)

Selected collaboration on adaptive dynamic programming and nonlinear optimal control with trajectory-based initialization.
